items.title: Suns win Game 3 at Summer League, 95-88. Khaman Maluach had 21 points, 10 rebounds and 4 blocks, Koa Peat added 19 points and 6 rebounds on 8-15 FG, Koby Brea busted out of his slump with 19 points on 6-11 3P, and Rasheer Fleming finished with 9 points and 4 boards on 3-5 3P
items.author: Gerald Bourguet

items.title: Brian Gregory on Koa Peat being the hometown pick for the Suns: "It's different when this is where you grew up."
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt:
Brian Gregory on Koa Peat being the hometown pick for the Suns: "It's different when this is where you grew up."

Mentioned Peat was 10 when Devin Booker came to the Suns, and he remembers the Finals run. PHX liked him already, but they felt even better about it with his AZ ties

items.title: Suns GM Brian Gregory on Koa Peat's 3-point shooting: "Obviously that was a topic, and he's a guy that I think is going to develop into a very good shooter."
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt:
Suns GM Brian Gregory on Koa Peat's 3-point shooting: "Obviously that was a topic, and he's a guy that I think is going to develop into a very good shooter."

Cited his work ethic and guys needing to develop certain areas of their game at 19, but called his ability to get to the rim "critical"

items.title: All I'll say about Koa Peat: he averaged 4.5 free throw attempts per game at 6'7", 245 pounds. And only the Bucks and Celtics had lower free throw attempt rates than the Phoenix Suns last season.

items.title: Sources: New York traded No. 25 pick Sergio De Larrea to the Dallas Mavericks for No. 30 Koa Peat and two second-round picks. And then the Knicks traded Peat to the Phoenix Suns for three-rounders and cash. So Knicks move out of the first round -- pick up 5 seconds and cash.

items.title: Koa Peat comes from a family of seven kids who all played D1 sports, led by an NFL dad and a brother who made three Pro Bowls.
items.author: Steph Noh
items.body_excerpt:
Koa Peat comes from a family of seven kids who all played D1 sports, led by an NFL dad and a brother who made three Pro Bowls.  

He's the best athlete of them all.   

I asked him about his family, his football skills, and his swing skill jumper:

www.sportingnews.com/us/nba/news/...

media.title: Koa Peat, brother of NFL Pro Bowler Andrus Peat, is ready to make his own name in the NBA | Sporting News
media.description: The Peats are legends in Arizona for their football prowess. Koa Peat is trying to bring that same reputation to the hardwood.
